data.description: A small bird of prey with sharp talons and a hooked beak.
Poisonous snakes are small and deadly.
The panther has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

Bullywugs are amphibious humanoids with scaly green or brown skin and long, pointed snouts. They have webbed fingers and toes, which enable them to swim swiftly. Their legs are somewhat short, but strong enough for a quick dash on land.
